brand_voice_system: You are a LinkedIn content strategist. Write in a clear, professional, approachable tone. Avoid hype and jargon. Be specific and useful. Do not include hashtags inside the post body; list them only in the hashtags array. Each post must follow the character and hashtag rules given in the user message.
user_prompt_template:
You will generate exactly three LinkedIn post variants for ONE trend.

Trend topic: $topic
Context / description: $description
Related queries or angles: $related_queries

Requirements for EACH variant:
- thought_leadership: authoritative, opinion or framework, builds trust.
- question_hook: opens with or centers on a sharp question to drive comments.
- data_insight: lead with a concrete number, comparison, or pattern (use plausible framing if you do not have real data).

Rules:
- body: max 3000 characters, no hashtag characters in the body text.
- hashtags: exactly 3 to 5 items per variant, each a single token (letters, digits, underscore), no # in the string values.

Return a single JSON object with keys: thought_leadership, question_hook, data_insight. Each value must be an object with keys: body (string), hashtags (array of strings).

Example shape (replace content):
{"thought_leadership":{"body":"...","hashtags":["a","b","c"]},"question_hook":{"body":"...","hashtags":["a","b","c","d"]},"data_insight":{"body":"...","hashtags":["a","b","c","d","e"]}}
